memoryArtifacts.headline: Village & Parrish of Pitminster
memoryArtifacts.description:
Pitminster is a village and parish in Somerset, England, situated four miles south of Taunton in the Taunton Deane district.
By the time of the Domesday Book (1086) the population of Taunton was about …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Coxe於1569年10月9日出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯托斯登時，他的父親Richard Cox69歲，母親Jane Anne Auder65歲。他於1576年1月21日與Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow在英國英格蘭薩默塞特皮爾頓結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1630年1月20日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯托達享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾雷德福 塞墨勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Coxe于1569年10月9日出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾斯托斯登时，他的父亲Richard Cox69岁，母亲Jane Anne Auder65岁。他于1576年1月21日与Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow在英国英格兰薩默塞特皮爾頓结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1630年1月20日在英国英格兰史洛普爾斯托達享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾雷德福 塞墨勒。

nameMeanings.name: Coxe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Cox
meanings: English: variant of Cocke and Cook , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Ulster): mistranslation of Mac Con Coille (‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’), as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.
Dutch and Flemish: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Cock, a vernacular short form of Cornelius .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Coxe was born on 9 October 1569, in Stottesden, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Cox, was 69 and his mother, Jane Anne Auder, was 65. He married Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow on 21 January 1576, in Pilton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 20 January 1630, in Stottesdon, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Radford Semele, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Coxe est né le 9 octobre 1569, à Stottesden, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Cox, avait 69 ans et sa mère, Jane Anne Auder, avait 65 ans. Il a épousé Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow le 21 janvier 1576, à Pilton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1630, à Stottesdon, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Radford Semele, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Coxe am 9. Oktober 1569 in Stottesden, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Cox 69 und seine Mutter Jane Anne Auder 65. Er hat am 21. Januar 1576 in Pilton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Januar 1630 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Stottesdon, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Radford Semele, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Coxe è nato il il 9 ottobre 1569 nel Stottesden, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Cox, aveva 69 anni e il suo madre, Jane Anne Auder, aveva 65 anni. Lui sposato Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow il 21 gennaio 1576, nel Pilton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 20 gennaio 1630, nel Stottesdon, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Radford Semele, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Coxeが1569年10月9日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアストッテスデンで生まれた時，父Richard Coxは69歳，母Jane Anne Auderは65歳であった。1576年1月21日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトピルトンでAlice Walsheer, Walsbrowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1630年1月20日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアストッテスドンで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアラドフォード セメルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Coxe(이)가 1569년 10월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스토츠든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Cox(은)는 69세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Anne Auder(은)는 65세였다. 그는 1576년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 피턴에서 Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1630년 1월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스토츠던에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 래드퍼드 젬일에 묻혔다.

pt.9 October 1569–20 January 1630: 9 de outubro de 1569–20 de janeiro de 1630
pt.Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, England, Unit: Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Henrico, Mecklenburg, Virginia, United S: Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América

pt.Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, England: Steeple Ashton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Coxe nasceu em 9 de outubro de 1569, em Stottesden, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Cox, tinha 69 anos e sua mãe, Jane Anne Auder, tinha 65 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow em 21 de janeiro de 1576, em Pilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1630, em Stottesdon, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Radford Semele, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Coxe родился 9 октября 1569 г. в местности стоттесден, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Cox было 69 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Anne Auder, 65. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow 21 января 1576 г. в местности пилтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер 20 января 1630 г. в местности стоттесдон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности радфорд семель, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Coxe nació el 9 de octubre de 1569, en Stottesden, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Cox, tenía 69 años y su mamá, Jane Anne Auder, tenía 65 años. Se casó con Alice Walsheer, Walsbrow el 21 de enero de 1576, en Pilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 20 de enero de 1630, en Stottesdon, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Radford Semele, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
